title: Project Management Essentials — Premium Certificate
description: A practical, globally-aligned introduction to managing projects from start to finish. Across 6 guided sessions you'll learn the project life cycle, how to scope work and manage stakeholders, build realistic schedules and budgets, handle risks and problems, lead and track a team, and close a project cleanly while capturing lessons learned. Includes worked examples, quizzes, flashcards and Teach-Back checkpoints. Finish the final assessment to earn a verifiable EFIKO Premium certificate you can add to your CV and LinkedIn. Ideal for students, graduates and early-career professionals stepping into project roles.

title: Digital Marketing Fundamentals — Premium Certificate
description: Learn to grow a brand, product or personal profile online — the modern skill every employer and entrepreneur wants. This 6-session premium course covers digital marketing strategy, content and social media, SEO and search, email and messaging, paid ads basics, and measuring what works with analytics. Packed with real examples relevant to African markets, plus quizzes, flashcards and Teach-Back checks. Complete it to earn a verifiable EFIKO Premium certificate. Perfect for students, side-hustlers, job-seekers and small-business owners who want practical, job-ready marketing skills.

title: Personal Financial Literacy — Premium Certificate
description: Take control of your money with a clear, practical foundation in personal finance. Over 6 sessions you'll master budgeting, saving and emergency funds, smart borrowing and avoiding debt traps, the basics of investing and growing wealth, and planning for goals — all grounded in real African contexts and mobile-money realities. Includes examples, quizzes, flashcards and Teach-Back checkpoints, and a verifiable EFIKO Premium certificate on completion. A must for every student and young professional who wants to build lifelong financial confidence.

title: Digital Mental Health — Premium Certificate
description: Screens, social media and constant connectivity shape how we feel and think. This beginner-friendly 6-session course gives African students and young professionals practical, culturally-grounded tools to protect their mental wellbeing online: understanding digital mental health, spotting warning signs, building healthier digital habits, handling online stress and comparison, coping skills and self-care, and finding trusted support safely. Includes examples, quizzes, flashcards and Teach-Back checks, plus a verifiable EFIKO Premium certificate. Note: this is educational self-help content, not a substitute for professional care — if you are struggling, please reach out to a qualified professional or a local helpline.

title: AI & Automation Integration — Premium Certificate
description: Turn AI and automation into a real productivity edge — the most in-demand skill of the moment. This practical 6-session course shows African students, professionals and entrepreneurs how to understand AI and automation, spot high-value opportunities in your work or business, write effective prompts, choose the right everyday tools (writing, images, data) for low-bandwidth realities, automate repetitive tasks, and use it all responsibly with a personal action plan. Includes real tool examples, quizzes, flashcards and Teach-Back checkpoints, plus a verifiable EFIKO Premium certificate. Perfect for anyone who wants to work smarter and grow their ideas with AI.

title: Transport Psychology — Premium Certificate
description: Why do most road crashes come down to the human behind the wheel? This rigorous yet accessible 6-session course explores how mind, behaviour and environment shape road safety: perception, attention and reaction; emotions, fatigue and impairment; risk, decision-making and human error; behaviour change for safer roads; and applying human-factors thinking to real incidents. Grounded in established models and African road realities, with examples, quizzes, flashcards and Teach-Back checks, plus a verifiable EFIKO Premium certificate. Ideal for students of psychology and transport, road-safety practitioners, fleet managers and professional drivers.
